hero.title: Fast & Reliable
hero.subtitle: Professional inspection service in Boudouaou-El-Bahri. Your safety is our absolute priority.

about.title: A Trusted Service, Always
about.description: GACI Boudouaou El Bahri Technical Inspection Center is an approved facility offering fast, reliable automotive technical inspection services compliant with Algerian regulations.
about.description2: Our team of qualified technicians is committed to providing you with a transparent, efficient, and time-respectful service.

services.title: What We Offer
services.subtitle: Comprehensive services to ensure your vehicle's safety and compliance.
services.s1Desc: Full official inspection of your vehicle compliant with current Algerian regulations.
services.s2Desc: In-depth verification of all mechanical, electrical and body systems of the vehicle.
services.s3Desc: Rigorous inspection of safety equipment: brakes, tires, lighting and steering.
services.s4Desc: Express technical assessment by our experts to quickly identify any anomalies.

hours.title: We Are Here For You
hours.subtitle: Open 6 days out of 7 for your convenience.
hours.note: No appointment needed — come directly to the center.

reviews.title: What They Say About Us
reviews.subtitle: Our customers' satisfaction is our greatest reward.
reviews.r1Text: Fast and professional service. Welcoming staff, I was attended to quickly. I highly recommend this center.
reviews.r2Text: Good welcome and fast service, plan for 1 hour maximum no more. Serious technicians who listen.
reviews.r3Text: Very good center, clean and well organized. The inspection was done quickly and results delivered on time.

contact.title: Come Visit Us
contact.subtitle: Our team is available to answer all your questions.
